description: Autumn-related WSTCF — 🍂 marker in header, TSE reporter

input.location: Thorpe on the Hill on the Up Newark
input.mechanism: CENTRIX alarm on 2723 T/C SCWO with passage of 2L50 at Thorpe on the Hill on the Up Newark. Abnormal track circuit current detected; rise time exceeded 1905ms threshold.

expected:
⚠️🍂 *East Midlands Route - Autumn Related WSTCF*
TSE advises Autumn related WSTCF on 2723 T/C SCWO at Thorpe on the Hill on the Up Newark. CENTRIX alarm on 2723 T/C SCWO with passage of 2L50 at Thorpe on the Hill on the Up Newark. Abnormal track circuit current detected; rise time exceeded 1905ms threshold. LOM aware. Double block working implemented. L2 S&T advised.
